--bg-color.description: Page/section background color. Driven by brand primary in light theme.

--color-bg-surface.description: Default white surface background. Used by cards, menus, modals, forms.

--color-bg-subtle.description: Tinted/inset surface background. Used by featured items, table headers, banners.

--color-bg-subtle-active.description: Active/selected state for tinted surfaces. Used by tabs, progress bars, forms.

--color-bg-inverse.description: Dark/inverse background. Used by primary buttons, dark sections, overlays.

--color-bg-overlay.description: Semi-dark overlay background. Used by nav screens, side nav mobile.

--color-bg-recessed.description: Deeply recessed background. Used by chart skeletons, AI banner, side overlays.

--color-bg-brand.description: Brand accent background. Used by active indicators, progress, chart toggles.

--color-bg-brand-emphasis.description: Emphasized brand background. Used by icon buttons, definition active states.

--color-bg-brand-hover.description: Hover/strong variant of brand background. Used by Definition component hover states.

--color-fg-default.description: Primary text and icon color on light surfaces.

--color-fg-subtle.description: Secondary/subdued text. Used for descriptions, meta text.

--color-fg-muted.description: Muted/tertiary text. Used for placeholders, icons, helper text.

--color-fg-faint.description: Faint text and icon color. Used for disabled-adjacent states.

--color-fg-inverse-subtle.description: Muted foreground on dark backgrounds. Used in secondary/dark themes.

--color-fg-inverse.description: White foreground for use on dark/inverse backgrounds.

--color-fg-on-brand.description: Text/icon color on brand-colored backgrounds (yellow). Must stay dark for contrast.

--color-fg-brand-dark.description: Dark brand accent for de-emphasized text on light backgrounds.

--color-fg-brand.description: Brand-colored text or icon. Used for emphasized text, stats, animated accordion.

--color-fg-dark-subtle.description: Subtle dark foreground. Used on very dark backgrounds.

--color-fg-dark-muted.description: Muted foreground on dark surfaces. Used for featured item text, nav.

--color-border-default.description: Default strong border. Used by primary buttons, dark outline components.

--color-border-subtle.description: Subtle divider/border. Used by header menus, tables, footnotes.

--color-border-moderate.description: Moderate border weight. Used by tabs, form inputs, accordions.

--color-border-muted.description: Muted border. Used by footnotes, icon buttons, side overlays.

--color-border-brand-emphasis.description: Emphasized brand border. Used by topic hover, definition active.

--color-border-brand.description: Brand-colored border. Used for active states: chart toggles, block nav.

--color-border-dark-subtle.description: Subtle border on dark surfaces. Used by dark theme menus, side nav.

--gutter-color.description: Divider / gutter color between layout sections.

--color-status-focus.description: Focus ring color. Used by form inputs and autocomplete.

--action-text-default-color.description: Default color for interactive text elements (nav items, links).

--action-text-hover-color.description: Hover color for interactive text elements.

--action-text-active-color.description: Active/selected color for interactive text elements.

--action-indicator-hover-color.description: Hover color for interactive indicator elements (underlines, dots).

--action-indicator-active-color.description: Active color for interactive indicator elements.

--action-indicator-hover-opacity.description: Opacity for hover state indicator elements.

gradient-transparency.description: Figma only token - Made for gradient overlays with transparency used on Carousel, Tabs, SubNav.

bg-gradient-transparent.description: Figma only token - Made for making to work the gradient overlays with transparency used on Carousel, Tabs, SubNav.

--border-width-none.description: No border (0px). Used by: Content, Carousel Card, Dropdown Button, Media, and Summary Card.

--border-width-s.description: Small/thin border (1px). Used by: Cookie Modal, Cookie Settings, and Content Decoration.

--border-width-m.description: Medium/base border (2px). Used by: Button, Form Input, Side Navigation Desktop, Icon Button, and Autocomplete.

--border-width-l.description: Large/thick border (5px). Reserved for future heavy emphasis components.

--border-width-xl.description: Extra large/heavy border (9px). Reserved for future structural layouts or heavy focus states.

--border-radius-none.description: No border radius (0px). Used for sharp corners and Snap theme overrides.

--border-radius-xs.description: Extra small radius (4px). Reserved for tight nested elements, small tags, or tooltips.

--border-radius-s.description: Small radius (8px). Used by: Cookie Modal, Cookie Settings Category, Dropdown Button, Media, and Mosaic.

--border-radius-m.description: Medium radius (16px). Used by: Carousel Card, Form Input, and Summary Card.

--border-radius-l.description: Large radius (24px). Reserved for large modals or featured layout containers.

--border-radius-pill.description: Fully rounded/pill shape (64px). Used by: Button, and semantic Shape tokens (Interactive/Card).
